Usage:
  circleci mcp claude [command]

Available Commands:
  disable     Remove server from Claude config
  enable      Add server to Claude config
  list        Show Claude MCP servers

Global Flags:
  -c, --config string   path to config file (default: ~/.config/circleci/config.yml)
      --debug           enable debug logging
  -q, --quiet           suppress informational output; data on stdout is unaffected

Use "circleci mcp claude [command] --help" for more information about a command.
